hero.subtitle: EPRO is a multi-tenant SaaS platform. Students, teachers, courses, attendance, grading, billing, and real-time chat — all in one place.
hero.noCard: No credit card • Set up in 5 minutes

features.title: One platform — everything in it
features.subtitle: All modules a tutoring center needs. Ditch the spreadsheets and disconnected tools.

lms.title: LMS — courses & lessons
lms.description: Courses, modules, lessons, assignments, tests, video, materials — all together.

billing.title: Billing & payments
billing.description: Receive, track debt, payroll. Click and Payme ready.

tenants.title: Multi-tenant architecture
tenants.description: Each school gets its own DB and subdomain. Full isolation, GDPR.

reports.title: Real-time reports
reports.description: Teacher performance, course activity, payment analytics — live.

chat.title: Real-time chat
chat.description: Group chat, parent notifications, file sharing. WebSocket-powered.

telegram.title: Telegram bot
telegram.description: Auto-notifications to parents. Requests via bot.

mobile.title: Mobile PWA
mobile.description: No native Android/iOS apps needed. Web, but app-like.

security.title: Enterprise security
security.description: 2FA, audit, RBAC, daily backups, GDPR/Cookie compliance.

i18n.title: Multi-language
i18n.description: Uzbek, Russian, English. Your customers in their language.

pricing.title: Pricing — transparent and fair
pricing.subtitle: For small centers and big networks. Pay as you grow.

cta.title: Start today, see the difference tomorrow
cta.subtitle: 14 days free. No card. Cancel anytime.

footer.tagline: Modern management for tutoring centers. Built in Tashkent, 2026.

featuresPage.title: Every tool your center needs
featuresPage.subtitle: 23 modules, ~380 APIs, 65+ pages. But you don't need to know it all — the UI guides you.

tenants.title: Multi-tenancy
tenants.description: Branch or franchise — each in its subdomain.

pricingPage.title: The right plan for your center
pricingPage.subtitle: 14 days free. No card. Switch plans anytime.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes. No card needed, no hidden fees. Data is kept 30 days after trial expires.
faq.a2: Click, Payme, Uzcard, Humo, bank transfer. Legal entities get proper contracts and invoices.
faq.a3: Germany DC with daily backups. Enterprise plan can use Uzbekistan-local servers.
faq.a4: Yes, anytime up or down. Pro-rata billing.

securityPage.title: Your data — yours
securityPage.subtitle: Security is feature #1, not a checkbox.

isolation.title: Tenant isolation
isolation.description: Each school has its own MySQL DB.

aboutPage.title: About
aboutPage.lead: EPRO — from Tashkent, across Uzbekistan. For tutoring centers, by a team that grew out of one.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: Solve the tech problem for center owners, so they can focus on what matters: quality education.

story.title: Story
story.body: Spring 2026. One local tutor's pain — "3 days a month on Excel" — kicked this off.

values.title: Values
values.v1: Local-first — we don't copy European SaaS, we build for Uzbek market
values.v2: Speed — if a page takes > 1s, we're embarrassed
values.v4: Support — every customer messages us directly on Telegram
